name: No Ghost in Circus Caravan
developer: Midori Games / みどりげーむず
publisher: Midori Games / みどりげーむず
short_description: It's a small... somewhat eerie circus caravan. Each round lasts a few minutes, leading to numerous endings. Unravel the mysteries and control the outcomes. In the end, you might just hold it in your hands...
detailed_description:
One day, you visit the "Mesel Circus Caravan".
You are chosen to be the manager for a day.
Decide the program, choose the performers...
But there's something a bit strange about this circus...

The ringmaster, Lina, whispers to you:

"Don't spread weird rumors.
There are no ghosts in this circus.
Absolutely no ghosts..."

────────────────────

A click horror game where each round lasts just a few minutes, leading to numerous endings based on your actions.
Use hint icons to unravel the flags,
and explore the stage, dressing room, and warehouse filled with traps...

Guide this small circus to various endings.
But beware, as the level of supernatural disturbances rises, terrifying outcomes await...

In the end, you might just grasp the secret artifact hidden within the circus.

────────────────────

【Members of the Circus Caravan】

● Lina
The spirited and reliable girl who leads the Mesel Circus Caravan!
Full name: Lina Mesellotte-Hida.

● Silhouette
Lina's partner, a cute white snake.
Small but a dependable performer!

● Puppeteer
A mysterious puppeteer with an unknown name, face, and age.
Even Lina doesn't know much about them.

● Chriqoo
The circus's agile monkey!
Always bringing excitement to the stage.

────────────────────

🌱You are free to stream, create fan works, and monetize anything related to Midori Games titles without any restrictions.
